_instructions: Paste real examples of your best-performing content here. These are the gold standard Claude matches when writing new content. The more real examples you add, the better the voice fidelity. Minimum 5. Aim for 10–15 across different formats and pillars.

examples._instructions: Add a minimum of 5 real examples. Include variety across formats and pillars. The proof_story and case_study formats should appear at least twice — they drive the most saves and DM sends. Delete this object when done.
